Purchased my wedding outfit from here, whose delivery date was 9 nov but it was ready on 5 nov so I visited the store to collect the outfit where I found that they created the huge mess and made the outfit disaster, after so much arguments the owner of the store assured me that he`ll resolve the issue and change the delivery date from 9 nov to 13 nov as my wedding date is 15 nov in haridwar I had no option but to take a risk so I agree and gave them a chance to resolve the issue but today (13 nov) my outfit was not ready till 6 p.m. and they were forced me to wait as they don`t have refund policy I paid them Rs.26000 on 10 Oct and Rs.4000 on 13 November (today) for an incomplete outfit which was not stitched the lehnga flares was not provided by them as promised, the work on dupatta was not same as promised and also they even did not provide me the waist belt, now I`m in a different city for my own wedding without a wedding outfit, all thanks to them. I don`t understand how they run their business in market because as much as your wedding is precious for you as same as it was joke to the shop owner because when I asked for refund he said `` kisi ki aatma kalpa k ap subh kaam krne k liye jare ho`` instead of apologize he shows the arrogance and attitude towards me. Your wedding day will be spoiled if you trust them because their only purpose is to earn money. You can check the lehnga work in photo which is still packed.

Kala Shree offers a fantastic range of clothing and accessories that are true to size and in stock. The polite and helpful staff ensure a good fitting, and the management is top-notch. Plus, there are discounts available, making it an excellent choice for all your fashion needs.

Really disappointing, we had gone there for a wedding lehanga. The first time we went there, they made us wait for an hour and then when we said we getting late, they started showing us stuff. We hardly spent 15-20 minutes that day because we were already late. Next time we had gone to this shop in morning assuming they will have time, they showed us some 5-6 lehangas. The staff had a lot of attitude and they were really proud of stealing the designs of known designers. We shortlisted one lehanga thinking we will check a few more and then may be come back if this is the best option. The next day we went there and asked for just that shortlisted one, the shop owner (a chubby guy with specs) said I will only entertain you if you are willing to pay and place the order. He was really rude and kept saying we only entertain our regular customers. We are not interested in retail, we left the place without much argument because I imagine the follow-up service will be equally bad. Who shouts at their customers, I believe for a wedding lehanga, the bride deserves atleast a second look before making her decision of a purchase close to 1 lakh. NOT RECOMMENDED AT ALL. Pay 5-7K more at a know shop so that you are sure your wedding lehanga and your mood is not ruined.

Had a *very bad experience* here. I went with my family to check out lehengas for my *wedding*, and one of the staff members — a boy with glasses — was *extremely rude*. I took a picture of a lehenga without knowing it`s not allowed (I`m new to Delhi and wasn`t aware of this Chandni Chowk rule), and instead of politely informing me, he *fought with me in front of my family*. It was humiliating and completely uncalled for.   To make it worse, the collection isn`t even that great — definitely not worth the hype. The entire experience was upsetting, and I *highly do not recommend* this place, especially for something as special as wedding shopping

Initially when I entered the shop I got very angry looking at the quality and the variety. I bought a designer suit which was crushed and they assured me that before packing the stuff they will get it ironed. I had to leave my dress for alteration for which they charged 2500 ( a patch of cloth to be added in the back). They talked as if they are charging a small amount. Anyway I came again for collection. It was even more crushed than it was on the 1st day. I asked to get it ironed. They started making excuses, sick excuses I must say. They told me the dress will look bad with ironing. I argued with them and pleaded badly to get it ironed. Eventually it got ironed. When they finally put it in the packet, the bottom and dupatta were missing. They told me that I took them with myself on the first day only without even checking. Finally after enough arguments, I got all the stuffs for which I paid on day one only. They will behave properly till the time they got the money after that they will simply erase everything from their memory. It was really pathetic and unhelping.
